name: RedAlert MCP Server - Real-time Alert Tools E2E Test Plan
description: End-to-end test sequences for Socket.IO real-time alert subscription tools. All tests use testMode: true to avoid depending on real alerts.

sequences.name: Full lifecycle
sequences.description: Subscribe -> status check -> poll -> unsubscribe -> status check

sequences.name: Poll before subscribe
sequences.description: Poll without subscribing first - should return error

sequences.name: Subscribe with alert type filter
sequences.description: Subscribe to specific alert types only

sequences.name: Subscribe with timing and multi-poll
sequences.description: Subscribe with fast timing, poll multiple times to see alerts accumulate

sequences.name: Double subscribe
sequences.description: Subscribe twice - second should reset connection cleanly

sequences.name: Status check when not subscribed
sequences.description: Check status with no active subscription

tests.description: Subscribe to all alerts in test mode

validate.description: Should return connected status with testMode true and list of subscribed types

tests.description: Check subscription status after subscribing

validate.description: Should show connected=true, testMode=true, and connectedSince as non-null ISO timestamp

tests.description: Poll for alerts after waiting for test server to send some

validate.description: Should return alerts array (may have 0+ alerts depending on test server timing). alertCount should be a number >= 0.

tests.description: Unsubscribe from alerts

validate.description: Should return disconnected status with confirmation message

tests.description: Check status after unsubscribing

validate.description: Should show connected=false, empty subscribedTypes, testMode=false, bufferedAlerts=0

tests.description: Poll alerts without subscribing first - should error

validate.description: Should return an error indicating subscription is required before polling

tests.description: Subscribe to only missiles and earthQuake alert types in test mode

validate.description: Should connect and subscribe only to missiles and earthQuake types

tests.description: Verify filtered subscription status shows only selected types

validate.description: subscribedTypes should contain exactly missiles and earthQuake

tests.description: Clean up - unsubscribe from filtered subscription

validate.description: Should disconnect cleanly

tests.description: Subscribe with fast timing for multi-poll test

validate.description: Should connect with 1s timing interval

tests.description: First poll - peek without acknowledging

validate.description: Should return alerts without clearing the buffer (peek mode). alertCount and bufferSize should be equal since nothing was acknowledged.

tests.description: Second poll - acknowledge alerts this time

validate.description: Should return and clear buffered alerts. bufferSize should be 0 after acknowledge.

tests.description: Third poll - should have new alerts after waiting

validate.description: Should have accumulated new alerts during the delay period

tests.description: Clean up - unsubscribe after multi-poll test

validate.description: Should disconnect cleanly

tests.description: Unsubscribe when not subscribed - should succeed gracefully

validate.description: Should return disconnected status without error even when not subscribed

tests.description: First subscription for double-subscribe test

validate.description: First subscription should connect successfully

tests.description: Second subscription - should reset and reconnect

validate.description: Second subscribe should disconnect old connection and establish new one with updated filters

tests.description: Verify status reflects second subscription, not first

validate.description: Status should show the second subscription's config (missiles only)

tests.description: Clean up double-subscribe test

validate.description: Should disconnect cleanly

tests.description: Check status when not subscribed at all

validate.description: Should return default disconnected state with all fields at their zero/null values
